title: Futura 2 Step Ladder Grey, Heavy-Duty Steel Folding Ladder & Folding Step Stool with Wide Non-Slip Steps, Anti Slip Feet, 150kg Load Capacity, Ideal for Home/Kitchen/Garden or DIY Step Stool
features: Strong & Safe 2 Step Ladder – Max Weight 150Kg: The Futura grey durable 2 step ladder features wide non-slip steps measuring 30x20cm with a secure 23cm step height. Ideal as a small step ladder, ladder, or kitchen step stool for safe everyday use.

Multi-Use Step Ladders, Step Stool & Folding Step Stool: Versatile design functions as a step stool, folding step stool, foldable step stool, and compact household ladder. Perfect for kitchens, garages, DIY and jobs where large ladders extendable aren’t needed.

Easy Folding Step Design - Compact Storage (89x46.5x4cm Folded): Smooth 2 step ladder folding mechanism allows it to fold flat to 89x46.5x4cm, making it ideal as a folding step, step ladder 2 step, or portable folding step stool that stores neatly in tight spaces.

Open Size 80x46.5x50cm – Lightweight, Stable & Non-Slip: When open, this step ladder stands at 80x46.5x50cm, offering firm stability with 30x20cm wide treads and rubberised anti-slip feet. The 23cm step height provides comfortable climbing on this secure 2 step ladder.

Exceptional UK Customer Service For All Step Ladders: Every Futura step ladder is backed by outstanding UK customer care, swift parts support and helpful aftercare. If you need assistance with your ladders, step ladders, or step stool, our team is here to help.
description: Upgrade your home, kitchen and garage tasks with the Futura 2 Step Ladder – a heavy-duty, steel-constructed step ladder designed to give you safe and reliable height whenever you need it. Built to support a max weight of 150kg, this ladder combines strength, stability and everyday practicality, making it the perfect solution for cleaning, decorating, DIY and reaching those high cupboard spaces. Featuring wide, non-slip steps and rubberised anti-slip feet, this 2 step ladder folding design ensures secure footing and confidence every time you climb. Whether you use it as a step ladder, step ladders, small step ladder, step stool, folding step stool, or kitchen step stool, it guarantees safe elevation without the bulk of larger ladders extendable styles. The smooth folding mechanism allows the ladder to collapse down to a compact 89×46.5×4cm, making it effortless to store behind doors, in cupboards or utility rooms. When opened, the ladder stands at 80×46.5×50cm, providing a sturdy, comfortable height for everyday household tasks. Lightweight yet durable, it’s easy to carry around the home while maintaining exceptional stability thanks to its steel frame and non-slip treads. Perfect for kitchens, garages, bedrooms, offices and DIY spaces, this foldable step stool works wherever you need quick and safe access to higher areas. From changing lightbulbs to painting walls or organising storage, the Futura 2 step ladder delivers dependable performance in every situation. To give you complete peace of mind, all Futura step ladders come with exceptional UK customer service, fast replacement parts and reliable aftercare. If you ever need assistance with your ladder or step stool, our support team is always here to help.
